title: Data Engineer in Finance, Risk and Data Tribe | SEB, Riga

summary.lv: SEB Finance, Risk and Data Tribe meklē Data Engineer, kas izstrādās un uzturēs datu platformu finanšu un risku datiem, ETL plūsmas un datu modeļus.
summary.en: SEB's Finance, Risk and Data Tribe is hiring a Data Engineer to build and maintain the data platform for finance & risk data — ETL pipelines and data models.
